title: VETERANS SERVICES - 211info
text: JEFFERSON COUNTY VETERANS SERVICE OFFICE VETERANS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF County Veterans Service Offices (CVSOs) serve as the entry points to understanding the benefits, resources, and entitlements available to veterans, their dependents, and survivors. CVSOs can provide the following: -Veterans' benefits counseling and claims preparation assistance, as well as advocacy throughout the claims process -Counseling on federal VA benefits and other state and federal ancillary benefits -Educational benefit claims assistance -Assistance for veterans who wish to enroll in health care -Assistance for requesting military service documents -Service-connected and non-service-related disability and survivor benefits -Burial benefits -Information about veteran home loans -Oregon Veterans' Home Conservatorship services, including total estate management for eligible individuals who are legally determined to be "protected persons" under Oregon law. 860 SW Madison Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Veterans with any discharge status other than dishonorable and their immediate family members (spouses, surviving spouses who have not remarried, children, or stepchildren) Hours: Office: Monday/Wednesday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm by appointment Outreach locations: Crooked River Ranch: 3rd Tuesday of the month by appointment Deer Ridge Correctional Facility: 2nd Tuesday of the month by appointment Email (541) 475-5228 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-5228 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email or call for an appointment or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: A copy of the veteran's discharge document (DD214 or Honorable Discharge). If these records are not available, the VSO will help get them. If other records are needed, the VSO will let the client know. AREA SERVED: Jefferson County Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Burial Benefits * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues General Health Insurance Information/Counseling * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Military Records Other Services Offered At This Location: TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - OREGON VETERANS EMERGENCY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JEFFERSON COUNTY VETERANS SERVICE OFFICE
